description: Add an emoji reaction to an issue comment, pull request review comment, or repository commit comment (same owner/repo/comment_id; comment_type selects the GitHub reactions endpoint).

comment_id.description: Comment id for the chosen comment_type (issue comment id, pull review comment id, or commit comment id).

content.description: Reaction type per GitHub Reactions API.

comment_type.description: issue_comment: comment on an issue or PR conversation thread; pull_request_review: inline review comment on a diff; commit: comment on a commit. Each uses a distinct comment id namespace. Defaults to pull_request_review.
